title: make image parent check more robust
body:
Follow up on issue #7444 and make the parent checks more robust.
We can end up with an incoherent storage when, for instance, a
build has been killed.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

At this point, we're very late in the cycle for 8.3 - we can talk at WC tomorrow, but if you think this is necessary we definitely need a BZ.
